content.problemStatement:
There are NNN integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​ on a circle. For each valid iii, AiA_iAi​ and Ai+1A_{i+1}Ai+1​ are adjacent; A1A_1A1​ and ANA_NAN​ are also adjacent.

Chef has a sequence of integers B1,B2,…,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1​,B2​,…,BN​, which he may use to perform any number of operations (including zero). In one operation, he should do the following:


Choose an integer iii (1≤i≤N1 \le i \le N1≤i≤N).
Choose iii consecutive integers on the circle.
Choose a sign S=±1S = \pm 1S=±1 and add S⋅BiS \cdot B_iS⋅Bi​ to each of the chosen integers. In other words, either add BiB_iBi​ to each of them or subtract BiB_iBi​ from each of them.
The goal is to make all the integers on the circle equal to 000. Can Chef achieve it using these operations?
constraints: 0≤Ai,Bi≤1040 \le A_i, B_i \le 10^40≤Ai​,Bi​≤104 for each valid iii
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10410^4104
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
The third line contains NNN space-separated integers B1,B2,…,BNB_1, B_2, \ldots, B_NB1​,B2​,…,BN​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing the string `"YES"` if it is possible to make all integers on the circle equal to 000 or `"NO"` if it is impossible.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: We can make everything 000 using two operations: choose i=4i = 4i=4 and change the circular sequence (1,1,3,3,2)(1, 1, 3, 3, 2)(1,1,3,3,2) to (1−1,1−1,3−1,3−1,2)=(0,0,2,2,2)(1-1, 1-1, 3-1, 3-1, 2) = (0, 0, 2, 2, 2)(1−1,1−1,3−1,3−1,2)=(0,0,2,2,2), then choose i=3i = 3i=3 and change it to (0,0,2−2,2−2,2−2)=(0,0,0,0,0)(0, 0, 2-2, 2-2, 2-2) = (0, 0, 0, 0, 0)(0,0,2−2,2−2,2−2)=(0,0,0,0,0).
Example case 2: The parities of integers on the circle cannot change, so they cannot become 000.
